config.name: beyondtrust_passwordsafe_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: beyondtrust_passwordsafe_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Access Activity (3005)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:14:41.294444

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local pairs = pairs
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format
local table_insert = table.insert

-- Validation helper functions
local function validate_string(value)
    return type(value) == "string" and #value > 0
end

local function validate_number(value) 
    return type(value) == "number"
end

-- Main transform function
function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize output with required OCSF fields
    local output = {
        metadata = {
            version = "1.0.0",
            product = {
                vendor_name = "BeyondTrust",
                name = "Password Safe",
                feature = {
                    name = "Access Activity Logging"
                }
            }
        },
        class_uid = 3005,
        class_name = "Access Activity", 
        category_uid = 3,
        category_name = "Identity & Access Management",
        time = os_time() * 1000,
        access_activity = {},
        user = {},
        src = {
            ip = {}
        }
    }

    -- Safe nested table access helper
    local function get_nested_value(t, ...)
        local current = t
        for _, k in ipairs({...}) do
            if type(current) ~= "table" then return nil end
            current = current[k]
        end
        return current
    end

    -- Extract nvps fields safely
    local nvps = record.nvps or {}
    
    -- Map activity name
    local event_name = nvps.eventname
    if validate_string(event_name) then
        output.access_activity.activity_name = event_name
    end

    -- Map username with validation
    local username = nvps.username
    if validate_string(username) then
        output.user.name = username
        -- Generate user ID if not present
        if not output.user.uid then
            output.user.uid = string_format("user_%s", username:gsub("%s+", "_"))
        end
    end

    -- Map IP address with validation
    local ip_addr = nvps.ipaddress
    if validate_string(ip_addr) then
        output.src.ip.address = ip_addr
    end

    -- Map additional fields with type checking
    if validate_string(nvps.severity) then
        output.access_activity.severity = nvps.severity
    end

    if validate_string(nvps.message) then
        output.access_activity.message = nvps.message
    end

    -- Enrich with authentication context if available
    if nvps.multifactorauthenticationenforced then
        output.authentication = {
            mfa = nvps.multifactorauthenticationenforced
        }
    end

    -- Add session details if present
    if validate_string(nvps.sessionmaskid) then
        output.session = {
            uid = nvps.sessionmaskid,
            name = nvps.sessionmaskname
        }
    end

    -- Validation before return
    if not output.class_uid or output.class_uid == 0 then
        return nil, "Missing required OCSF class_uid"
    end

    -- Add processing metadata
    output.metadata.processed_time = os_time() * 1000
    
    return output
end

-- Error handler wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string_format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
